turns.user_message: I've realized I'm the kind of person who just makes things awkward. It's easier to keep my distance today.
I keep noticing how conversations stall when I join in. It feels like my presence is a constant mood killer.
I'm convinced my silence is the only decent thing I offer people. My voice just seems to drain the joy out of rooms.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves.
